prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a heavy-industrial construction or process site where work follows engineered drawings, specifications, and permits. The work under review is Bearings & seals, part of the Equipment & Machinery scope. The observed field condition is: over-greasing (purged seal). The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: SKF/Timken mounting guides.
title: Tool and material selection: Bearings & seals (industrial site)
